untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) gap formation relative to previous bar, (2) identification of congestion zones (not available as indicators), (3) multi-bar trend analysis to confirm 'end of upward trend', (4) pattern recognition for horizontal/reversal movement after gap. These require custom candlestick pattern recognition and zone detection beyond the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation uses gap detection (close > prev_close with lower close than prev_high) and weakening momentum (rsi_14 < 70) as proxies for exhaustion. However, the core logic—distinguishing gap origin/destination from congestion zones and confirming trend exhaustion—cannot be reliably expressed with available indicators. A custom pattern detector is recommended.
